device_name: Digital Color Doppler Ultrasound System (P60 Series)
intended_use: The P60 Series Digital Color Doppler Ultrasound System is a general-purpose ultrasonic imaging instrument intended for use by appropriately trained healthcare professionals in hospital for evaluation
intended_use_full: The P60 Series Digital Color Doppler Ultrasound System is a general-purpose ultrasonic imaging instrument intended for use by appropriately trained healthcare professionals in hospital for evaluation of Fetal, Abdominal, Pediatric, Small Organ (breast, testes, thyroid), Cephalic (neonatal and adult), Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Peripheral Vascular, Cerebral Vascular, Musculoskeletal (Conventional and Superficial), Cardiac (pediatric and adult), Trans-esoph (Cardiac), Laparoscopic, OB/Gyn and Urology.
target_condition: Fetal imaging and biometric measurements during prenatal ultrasound examination
ground_truth: Ground truth drawn by five OB/GYN experts with more than 3 years' experience, cross-checked by two experts with more than 20 years' experience, and re-checked by four experts with more than 30 years' experience
other_metrics: Identification Precision of 14 Standard Sections (non-inferiority design: lower limit of 95% CI for difference greater than -10%); Measurement Error of 11 Growth Parameters; Sp (spinal cord cone end positioning) precision
